title: Materials Under Extreme Conditions

hugoniot.formula: ρ₀U_s = ρ(U_s-u_p): mass conservation across shock
hugoniot.why: Hugoniot EOS: P = ρ₀·c_s·u_p + ρ₀·S·u_p² = EML-2 (polynomial in up)

linear_hugoniot.formula: U_s = c_0 + S·u_p: EML-0 (linear) → EML-2 (with thermal corrections)

metallic_transition.why: Band gap closure: EML-∞; shadow=2 (resistivity real-valued)

warm_dense_matter.why: WDM: partial degeneracy → both classical(EML-2) and quantum(EML-3) simultaneously

thomas_fermi.formula: P_TF ~ ρ^{5/3}: EML-0 → EML-2 (power law via Fermi energy)

semiring_verdicts.new_finding: WDM (warm dense matter) = two-level {2,3}: first extreme-matter two-level ring

key_theorem: Extreme Materials Semiring Theorem (S302): Shock physics = EML-2 closed (Hugoniot, Mie-Grüneisen). Hydrogen metallization = TYPE 2 Horizon, shadow=2. NEW: Warm Dense Matter (WDM) = two-level ring {2,3}: partial degeneracy couples classical thermal physics (EML-2) with quantum oscillatory structure (EML-3). WDM is the 9th Langlands Universality instance. QCD deconfinement = TYPE 2 Horizon with two-level {2,3} shadow: hadronic(EML-2) ↔ QGP(EML-3). EXTREME MATERIALS DEPTH LADDER: EOS(EML-2) → Metallization(TYPE2) → WDM(two-level {2,3}) → QGP(TYPE2+two-level).
rabbit_hole_log: Shock physics: EML-2 closed (Hugoniot = polynomial EOS)
NEW: WDM = two-level {2,3}: 9th Langlands Universality Conjecture instance
Extreme matter unifies with nuclear/QCD: all show two-level ring at phase transitions
